title: Busted Configuration
description: JSON Schema for busted .busted configuration files (shape-B: return { <profile> = { ... } }). Each top-level key is a run profile (e.g. 'default') mapping to a profile options object.

pattern.description: Lua pattern matching test files to run (default '_spec').

ROOT.description: Root path(s) under which to search for test files.

lpath.description: Optional path prepended to package.path for locating Lua modules.

cpath.description: Optional path prepended to package.cpath for locating C modules.

helper.description: Path to a helper script run before all tests.

tags.description: Only run tests with these tags (#tag annotations).

defer-print.description: Defer printing of test results until all tests have completed.

lua.description: Path to the Lua interpreter to use when running tests.

exclude-tags.description: Do not run tests with these tags (#tag annotations).

filter.description: Only run tests whose full names match these Lua patterns.

filter-out.description: Do not run tests whose full names match these Lua patterns.
